Description: Beautiful addition to home decor or archaic punishment for offending flora? Perhaps it is both.
Beautiful addition to home décor or archaic punishment for offending flora? Perhaps it is both.

One sip and you'll feel as though every inch of your body has been made steel, impervious to the feeble blows of mortal men─not altogether different from a night at the pub.

※For collectable submissions only.

One sip and you'll feel as though every ilm of your body has been made steel, impervious to the feeble blows of mortal men─not altogether different from a night at the pub.

※For collectable submissions only.
Music roll for <Emphasis>Kaleidoscope</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Kaleidoscope Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Carrots of Passion</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Carrots of Passion Orchestrion Roll

Description: A futuristic bench developed for use on distant stars. Though visually appealing, its unyielding surface has led more than one overworked initiative member to question whether the future must needs be “such a pain in the arse.”
Name: Cosmoseat

Description: This futuristic partition incorporates a compact pantry and sink, as well as a helpful memo reminding users that even in the great expanse, everyone can smell your unwashed dishes.
Name: Cosmokitchen Partition

Description: Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this device was designed for the purpose of easily sending mass updates to exotablets whether at camp or in the field─though some Loporrits have been caught red-pawed using it to design frivolous games.
Name: Portable Exoterminal

Description: A freestanding roof to shelter one's rover from natural hazards.
Name: Docking Station Cover

Description: A marvel of space-saving public infrastructure, this lamppost incorporates 360-degree seating area.
Name: Cosmic Circumferbench

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for a voyager of the vast cosmos.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Cosmic Constructs Framer's Kit

Description:
Comes complete with pocket-sized pilot.

Use item to acquire the model suit minion.
Name: Model Suit

Description: An illustrated manual detailing a swift warm-up motion suitable for the moments immediately before a duel or particularly vigorous dance. Use to learn the /limber up emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - Anticipating Exertion

Description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 433
Name: Vacuum Suit Card

Description:
A rare (★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 434
Name: Namingway Card

Description: Augmented with advanced technology, this whistle produces an encoded sound that summons your interstellar dhalmel.
Name: Interstellar Dhalmel Whistle

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Left)</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Left)</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on chic leather eyepatches of varying colors. Use to unlock the ornamented leather eyepatch (left) facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Left)

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Right)</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Right)</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on chic leather eyepatches of varying colors. Use to unlock the ornamented leather eyepatch (right) facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Ornamented Leather Eyepatch (Right)

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Scaevan Headgear</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Scaevan Headgear</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on finely wrought headgear of varying colors. Use to unlock the Scaevan headgear facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Scaevan Headgear

Description: An even stranger ore warped by the abundant aether permeating the Occult Crescent.
Name: Waxing Arcanite

Description: A fragment of rare meteorite found in the lush forests of Yak T'el.
Name: Ut'ohmu Siderite

Description: Derived from rroneek hide, this thick glue is prepared using time-honored Hhetsarro techniques.
Name: Rroneek Glue

Singular: pinch of synthetic dark matter alpha
Plural: pinches of synthetic dark matter alpha
Description: This artificial psychosensitive compound is both highly pure and highly unstable, rendering it useless for all but a handful of applications.
Name: Synthetic Dark Matter Alpha

Singular: pinch of synthetic dark matter beta
Plural: pinches of synthetic dark matter beta
Description: This artificial psychosensitive compound is both highly pure and highly unstable, rendering it useless for all but a handful of applications.
Name: Synthetic Dark Matter Beta

Singular: pinch of synthetic dark matter gamma
Plural: pinches of synthetic dark matter gamma
Description: This artificial psychosensitive compound is both highly pure and highly unstable, rendering it useless for all but a handful of applications.
Name: Synthetic Dark Matter Gamma

Description: Phantom weapon.
Name: Phantom Sword Umbrae

Description:
Phantom weapon.
※Weapon appearance may take precedence over the display of hand gear.
Name: Phantom Knuckles Umbrae

Name: Phantom Bardiche Umbrae

Description:
A banded chest containing a full set of star pilot attire.

Required level: 1. IL: 1.
Name: Star Pilot Attire Coffer

Description: Cannot equip gear to legs.
Name: Star Pilot Suit

Description: Incorporating its own power source, the cosmoboard can be ridden totally freestyle, unbound to the routes of the Cosmoliner.
Name: Cosmoboard

Description: A thick albeit cheaply bound collection of 100 Phaenna exploration tokens, exchangeable for rare incentives prepared by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.
Name: Phaenna Token Booklet

Description: A slip awarded in exchange for successful completion of high-difficulty missions on Phaenna, and exchangeable for rare incentive items prepared by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative. Fortunately not made of glass.
Name: Phaenna Exploration Token

Description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your warp loader will magically bring the machine to life.
Name: Warp Loader Identification Key

Description: The sight of it alone enough to make a Loporrit hop with excitement, this ticket can be traded with Orbitingway for the chance to win valuable prizes.
Name: Big Bang Ticket (Phaenna)

Singular: set of temporary collection point materials
Plural: sets of temporary collection point materials
Name: Temporary Collection Point Materials

Singular: panel of longilateral xenostellar stained glass
Plural: panels of longilateral xenostellar stained glass
Name: Longilateral Xenostellar Stained Glass

Singular: panel of round xenostellar stained glass
Plural: panels of round xenostellar stained glass
Name: Round Xenostellar Stained Glass

Singular: panel of oblong xenostellar stained glass
Plural: panels of oblong xenostellar stained glass
Name: Oblong Xenostellar Stained Glass

Plural: bundles of standard wavekin leather straps
Name: Standard Wavekin Leather Straps

Name: Standard Wavekin Leather Straps

Name: Heat-resistant Survey Bag Materials

Name: Survey Station Artisan's Attire

Plural: sets of survey station artisan's attire
Name: Survey Station Artisan's Attire

Singular: set of dust-filtering survey mask materials
Plural: sets of dust-filtering survey mask materials
Name: Dust-filtering Survey Mask Materials

Singular: serving of launch party grape jelly
Plural: servings of launch party grape jelly
Name: Launch Party Grape Jelly

Singular: serving of launch party shaved ice
Plural: servings of launch party shaved ice
Name: Launch Party Shaved Ice

Singular: piece of launch party coffee candy

Name: Launch Party Coffee Candy

Description:
Phase 10 cosmic tool.
Increases to <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>quality<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> are 1.75 times higher than normal when material condition is <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Good<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
Completing a stellar mission from start to finish with this tool equipped grants a bonus to earned rewards.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Lunar Credit Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +35%
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Phaenna Credit Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +10%
